The Framework Agreement on Economic Cooperation between India and Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC being signed by the Union Minister for Commerce & Industry Shri Kamal Nath and by the Foreign Minister of Kuwait, Sheikh (Dr.) Mohammed Al-Salem Al-Sabah, on behalf of GCC, in New Delhi, on August 25, 2004 (Wednesday).
